title: Neoporteria fusca
taxonomy: Neoporteria fusca is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Neoporteria, which is a group of cacti native to the Atacama Desert in Chile. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage.
